'''Phaylenn''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] planet near [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and [[Ahlenn]].

==History==
Phaylenn had [[Stone/Legends|stony]] [[Beach/Legends|beaches]], tall broadleaf [[Tree/Legends|trees]] in its [[Forest/Legends|rainforests]], carnivorous animals, [[Foodstuff/Legends|meat]]-eating [[Plant/Legends|plants]], and quickbogs. It [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] a hot [[Star/Legends|sun]], had an average [[Temperature/Legends|temperature]] of 45 degrees Celsius, and was very [[Water/Legends|humid]]. The [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] of the planet contained many hostile creatures, though most were not any larger than [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. They were still dangerous, however, using their high natural dexterity, keen senses, and razor-sharp talons to make up for their small size.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it had a [[Shipyard/Legends|repair yard]] orbiting it and a standard [[Imperial garrison base]] on the planet itself. Two weeks after being damaged by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] forces at Bespin, the [[Enforcer (Executor-class)|''Enforcer'']], and the yards it was being repaired in, were destroyed at Phaylenn by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] while it was undergoing repairs.
